elevenlabs.description: ElevenLabs speech — transcribe audio (STT), convert text to audio (TTS), speak aloud

replicate.description: Replicate AI media — images (seedream, banana) and videos (wan-video)

trader.description: Solana trading — spot swap SOL/USDC and leveraged perpetual positions via Jupiter

price.description: Solana price analysis — Pyth prices, RSI/MACD/Bollinger signals, pivot-point levels, sentiment

browser.description: Browser automation via playwright-cli — navigate, click, fill forms, screenshot

solana-cli.description: Solana CLI tools — create wallets, check balances, transfer SOL

zerion.description: Multi-chain wallet portfolio — balances, positions, holdings across all EVM chains and Solana

telegram.description: Telegram Bot messaging — send text, photos, documents, audio, video

skills.name: audio/transcribe
skills.description: Transcribe audio files to text. Takes a directory of audio files, outputs per-file .txt and a combined transcript.

skills.name: audio/narrate
skills.description: Batch convert text files to audio files using ElevenLabs TTS. One .txt in, one audio file out.

skills.name: audio/speak
skills.description: Speak text aloud in real-time with immediate playback. For interactive use — not file output.

media.description: AI image generation and image-to-video via Replicate

skills.name: image/generate
skills.description: Generate images from text prompts. Default: seedream ($0.035/img). Also supports banana for anime style.

skills.name: video/generate
skills.description: Generate short videos from images using wan-video. Each image + paired .txt prompt becomes a .mp4.

solana.description: Solana trading, price analysis, and leveraged positions

skills.name: solana/fetch-price
skills.description: Real-time SOL/USD price, technical signals (RSI/MACD/Bollinger), support/resistance levels, sentiment.

skills.name: solana/trade
skills.description: Spot swap SOL/USDC and manage perpetual positions (open/close/pnl) via Jupiter.

skills.name: solana/open-perp
skills.description: Open leveraged perpetual position using technical analysis. Default 5x with structural stops.

skills.name: solana/dip-swap
skills.description: Auto dip-buyer: checks 1h price history, buys SOL on dips, sells on highs. Max 5 USDC budget.

skills.name: text/translate
skills.description: Translate text files between languages (default: English to Urdu). Keeps technical terms, optimized for TTS.

browser.description: Browser UI automation and web scraping

skills.name: browser/automate
skills.description: General browser automation — navigate, click, fill forms, screenshot, manage sessions via playwright-cli.

travel.description: Flight and accommodation search via browser automation

skills.name: travel/search-flights
skills.description: Search Google Flights for cheap flights between cities. Opens browser, fills form, reads results.

skills.name: travel/search-stays
skills.description: Search Airbnb for best value stays. Finds entire homes, compares price/rating/amenities.

workflow.description: Multi-skill pipelines that chain atomic skills end-to-end

skills.name: workflow/audio-story
skills.description: Audio to transcript to story to Urdu to images to videos to narrated audio. Full content pipeline.

wallet.description: Wallet management, multi-chain portfolio tracking, balances, and transfers

skills.name: wallet/portfolio
skills.description: Multi-chain portfolio — total value, breakdown by chain and type, 24h changes. Supports all EVM chains + Solana.

skills.name: wallet/positions
skills.description: List all token positions in a wallet — name, symbol, chain, quantity, value, 24h change.

skills.name: wallet/create
skills.description: Create a new Solana wallet (keypair). Generates a keypair file and shows the public address.

skills.name: wallet/balance
skills.description: Check SOL and SPL token balance for a Solana wallet address using the native CLI.

skills.name: wallet/transfer
skills.description: Transfer SOL between Solana wallets. Confirms amount and recipient before executing.

skills.name: wallet/config
skills.description: Configure Solana CLI — set RPC URL, default keypair, switch networks.

messaging.description: Send messages, files, and run results via Telegram

skills.name: messaging/send-text
skills.description: Send a text message via Telegram Bot.

skills.name: messaging/send-media
skills.description: Send photos, documents, audio, or video via Telegram Bot.

skills.name: messaging/send-results
skills.description: Format and send run results via Telegram — summary text + media attachments.

skills.name: utility/usage
skills.description: Show plugin and skill usage stats from hook logs. Zero overhead until invoked.

meta.description: Skill creation, review, and optimization tools

skills.name: meta/create-skill
skills.description: Create a new skill following agentskills.io spec with proper frontmatter, structure, and scripts.

skills.name: meta/review-skills
skills.description: Review, QA, and optimize existing skills against agentskills.io spec.
